detailed_analysis: The video opens with a fast countdown hook that stops scrolls, then quickly reveals and names seven products while stacking perceived value over $200. This builds middle-funnel desire through education and proof. The final 8 seconds shift to bottom-funnel urgency with scarcity language, driving viewers to check price and buy before sell-out. Fast pacing and continuous product visuals maintain retention despite no usage demo.

stages.label: Middle Funnel
stages.what_happens: Rapid product reveals, naming each item and total value to build desire and trust

stages.label: Bottom Funnel
stages.what_happens: Direct urgency pitch: check price, read reviews, buy now before sell-out

funnel_category_reason: Video opens with product demo and education (listing/hauling multiple items, showing ingredients and uses) then shifts in final 8 seconds to urgency/CTA push with discount mention and sell-out warning.
funnel_class_reason: Video opens with product demo and education (listing/hauling multiple items, showing ingredients and uses) then shifts in final 8 seconds to urgency/CTA push with discount mention and sell-out warning.

transcript: Not one, not two, not three, not four, not five, not six, but seven? Have you seen all these Dr. Malaxon products they're giving us at this discount? I got this whole box. This is over 200 worth of products. The makeup melting cleanser, the Kojik acid tumor spray, the black rice peel shot, their pink spicule serum, the picotonic shot, their viral calcium talks in a stick, and a jar of their liquid gold calcium volume eye patches. An entire skincare routine. Check your price, read those reviews. If anyone wants to try it, definitely get it now because I have a feeling this sale is going to sell them out again.
transcript_full: Not one, not two, not three, not four, not five, not six, but seven! Have you seen all these Dr. Malaxin products they're giving us at this discount? I got this whole box. This is over 200 worth of products: the makeup melting cleanser, the kojic acid turmeric spray, the black rice peel shot, their pink spicule serum, the picotonic shot, their viral calcium talks in a stick, and a jar of their liquid gold calcium volume eye patches. An entire skincare routine. Check your price, read those reviews. If anyone wants to try it, definitely get it now, because I have a feeling this sale is going to sell them out again.
transcript_hook: Not one, not two, not three, not four, not five, not six, but seven!

transcript: Yes, you get this entire box of 300 worth of products on a huge discount today. And here's the correct way to use it. Step number one is this pink spicule serum. Only use this two to three times a week because this is basically micro-needling in a bottle. Promotes youthful skin renewal and allows every product applied after to be absorbed deep into the skin. Step number two is the picotonic serum. This not only targets damaged skin and age spots, but it also improves skin firmness and brightness. Super good for collagen and elastin production. Step number three is the calcium volume firming cream. Apply it on your forehead, double chin, neck, and chest. A little bit definitely goes a long way. Very moisturizing and firming. Step number four is the one that everyone yaps about the talks in a stick. This is going to be your anti-aging stick. Help smooth out fine lines on your crow's feet, smile lines, under eyes, and forehead. Then the last step is your calcium eye patches. Helps boost collagen and hydrates all around the eyes, especially the under eyes. Definitely Dr. Meloxin's best deal bundle ever. If anyone wants to try it, definitely get it now because I have a feeling this sale is going to sell them out again.
transcript_full: Yes, you get this entire box of three hundred worth of products on a huge discount today, and here's the correct way to use it. Step number one is this pink spicule serum. Only use this two to three times a week because this is basically microneedling in a bottle. Promotes youthful skin renewal and allows every product applied after to be absorbed deep into the skin. Step number two is the pico tonic serum. This not only targets damaged skin and age spots, but it also improves skin firmness and brightness. Super good for collagen and elastin production. Step number three is the calcium volume firming cream. Apply it on your forehead, double chin, neck, and chest. A little bit definitely goes a long way. Very moisturizing and firming. Step number four is the one that everyone yaps about, the Tox in a Stick. This is going to be your anti-aging stick. Helps smooth out fine lines on your crow's feet, smile lines, under eyes, and forehead. Then the last step is your calcium eye patches. Helps boost collagen and hydrates all around the eyes, especially the under eyes. Definitely Dr. Melaxin's best deal bundle ever. If anyone wants to try it, definitely get it now because I have a feeling this sale is going to sell them out again.
transcript_hook: Yes, you get this entire box of three hundred worth of products on a huge discount today, and here's the correct way to use it.
